stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct regarding rain repellents?

options.a: The rain droplets bond into large drops that get blown away more easily by the airflow.
options.b: It improves the mechanical movement of the windshield wipers.
options.c: The liquid makes the rain drops flow uniformly by capillarity.
options.d: The chemical nature of the repellent evaporates the water.
